lastChunkSummary: Matched and accepted `func_1000FC18` in `init_EB00.c`, a multi-field sound table matcher/flag updater. Also brought `func_151347CC` to a one-instruction near-match (only `bnel` operand order in the `0x2D` replacement case differs) and explored `func_151415D4` briefly but skipped due persistent float FPR/register scheduling plateau.
